message: fix: replay skill source fixture drift

files.patch:
@@ -15,13 +15,7 @@ function makeSkill(name: string, desc = "A skill", filePath = `/skills/${name}/S

     filePath,
     baseDir: `/skills/${name}`,
-    sourceInfo: {
-      path: filePath,
-      source: "workspace",
-      scope: "project",
-      origin: "top-level",
-      baseDir: `/skills/${name}`,
-    },
+    source: "workspace",
     disableModelInvocation: false,
   };
 }
